Hero.title: Expert Plastering, Tiling & Painting
Hero.description: We don't claim, we prove it. Your reliable subcontractor for businesses and homeowners in Amsterdam. Since 2006.

Services.title: What We Do
Services.subtitle: From plastering to painting — we deliver craftsmanship for every project.

facades.title: Exterior Facades
facades.description: Professional facade finishing and renovation. From exterior plastering to facade cleaning and repair.

decorative.title: Decorative Plaster
decorative.description: Decorative plaster, smooth finish and textured plaster. Refined finishes for every interior.

Portfolio.title: Recent Projects

HowWeWork.title: How We Work
HowWeWork.subtitle: From first contact to delivery — a clear and transparent process.

step1.title: Free Quote
step1.description: Get in touch for a no-obligation quote. We discuss your needs and inspect the location.

step2.title: Expert Work
step2.description: Our team gets to work with professional tools and A-quality materials. You'll be kept informed throughout.

step3.title: Delivery
step3.description: After a thorough inspection we deliver the project. You only pay the final amount upon approval.

CTA.title: Ready for your project?
CTA.subtitle: Request a free, no-obligation quote today. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

q1.question: Is the quote free?
q1.answer: Yes, our quotes are completely free and without obligation. We're happy to visit you to assess the situation and agree on a fair price.

q2.question: How quickly can you start?
q2.answer: Depending on our schedule, we can often start within 1-2 weeks. For urgent jobs, we're available 24/7.

q3.question: How does payment work?
q3.answer: We work with a clear payment schedule: 30% upfront, a mid-project payment, and the final amount upon delivery.

q4.question: Do you offer a warranty?
q4.answer: Yes, we offer a 3 to 5 year warranty on our workmanship. Quality is our top priority.

q5.question: Do you clean up construction waste?
q5.answer: This depends on the project. We discuss this during the quote so you know exactly what to expect.

q6.question: Do you work on weekends or evenings?
q6.answer: Yes, our 24/7 emergency service is always available. For regular projects, we plan the best time together.

q7.question: What materials do you use?
q7.answer: We work exclusively with A-quality materials, including Sigma paint. This ensures a durable, long-lasting result.

q8.question: Do you handle permits?
q8.answer: No, the client is responsible for applying for permits and any homeowners association (VvE) approval. We're happy to advise you on this.

Footer.description: Kubus Plastering & Maintenance Company. We don't claim, we prove it. Since 2006 in Amsterdam.

DienstenPage.title: What We Do For You
DienstenPage.subtitle: Professional craftsmanship for every project — from plastering to parquet flooring.

facades.title: Exterior Facades
facades.description: Professional facade finishing and renovation. We handle exterior plastering, facade cleaning and repair for a durable, clean result. From new builds to historic properties.

roughcast.title: Roughcast Plastering
roughcast.description: Expert roughcast work as a base layer for further finishing. We ensure a solid, flat foundation on which any top layer adheres perfectly.

walls.title: Walls and Ceilings
walls.description: Complete wall and ceiling finishing for new builds and renovations. From plastering to textured finishes — always a clean, professional result.

decorative.title: Decorative Plaster
decorative.description: Decorative plastering for a unique look. From classic ornamental work to modern texture techniques.

sanding.title: Sanding Work
sanding.description: Professional sanding of walls, ceilings and floors. Perfect preparation for painting or a new finish coat.

painting.title: Painting
painting.description: Professional interior and exterior painting. We work exclusively with Sigma paint for a long-lasting, beautiful and protective finish.

tiles.title: Tiling
tiles.description: Expert tiling for bathrooms, kitchens, floors and facades. All tile types, from ceramic and porcelain to natural stone.

parquet.title: Parquet Flooring
parquet.description: Professional parquet installation, sanding and finishing. From solid oak to engineered parquet — always a stylish floor.

partitions.title: Partition Walls
partitions.description: Expert installation of partition and dividing walls. Ideal for creating extra rooms or dividing office spaces.

ProjectenPage.title: Our Projects
ProjectenPage.subtitle: View a selection of our most recent projects in Amsterdam and surroundings.

FAQPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQPage.subtitle: Find answers to the most commonly asked questions about our services.
FAQPage.ctaSubtitle: Feel free to contact us. We're happy to help.

AboutPage.title: Who We Are
AboutPage.storyP1: Kubus Klussenbedrijf is a reliable subcontractor based in Amsterdam. With over 20 years of experience in plastering, tiling and painting, we deliver craftsmanship of the highest quality. We work for both businesses and homeowners.
AboutPage.storyP2: Our strength lies in quality and speed. We work exclusively with A-quality materials, including Sigma paint, and offer a warranty on all our work. From small repairs to complete renovations — every project receives the same attention and professionalism.
AboutPage.certsSubtitle: We comply with the highest quality standards in construction.
AboutPage.areaDescription: We are active in Amsterdam and the Randstad region. From the city center to the suburbs — we're happy to visit you for a free quote.

ContactPage.title: Get in Touch
ContactPage.subtitle: Have a question or want to request a quote? We're here for you.
ContactPage.quoteCta: Or request a free quote directly

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.body: Kubusklus, based in Amsterdam, is responsible for the processing of personal data as shown in this privacy policy. We respect your privacy and ensure that your personal data is treated confidentially.

data.title: 2. What data do we collect?
data.body:
We process the following personal data when you fill in our quote form:
• Name
• Email address
• Phone number
• Project description
• Preferred start date

purpose.title: 3. Why do we use your data?
purpose.body:
We use your data exclusively to:
• Contact you about your quote request
• Prepare an appropriate quote
• Inform you about the progress of your project

sharing.title: 4. Sharing with third parties
sharing.body: Kubusklus does not sell your data to third parties. We only share your data when necessary for the execution of our services or when legally required.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.body: Our website only uses functional cookies necessary for the proper functioning of the website. We do not use tracking or marketing cookies.

rights.title: 6. Your rights
rights.body:
Under the GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation) you have the right to:
• View your personal data
• Have your data corrected or deleted
• Withdraw your consent for data processing
• File a complaint with the Data Protection Authority

contact.title: 7. Contact
contact.body: Do you have questions about our privacy policy? Contact us at info@kubusklus.nl or call 020 - 364 24 20.
